[et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.24.2" custom_padding="60px|60px|60px|60px||true"] [et_pb_text _builder_version="4.24.2" module_class="ppl-section-label-pink"]My Mission[/et_pb_text] [et_pb_text _builder_version="4.24.2" header_font="Playfair Display|700|||||||" header_text_color="#230d18" header_font_size="2rem" header_line_height="1.2em" header_letter_spacing="-0.025em" custom_margin="0||16px||false|false"]

Law school does not come with a clear set of instructions.

[/et_pb_text] [et_pb_text _builder_version="4.24.2" text_font="DM Sans||||||||" text_text_color="#555555" text_font_size="16px" text_line_height="1.75em"]I created The Pinkprint Lawyer to help students navigate complex systems with guidance. Here, you will find resources that are practical, evidence-informed, and designed to help you move through each stage of this journey with clarity, confidence, and intention.[/et_pb_text] [/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section] [et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.24.2" background_color="#faf4f7" custom_padding="96px||96px||false|false"] [et_pb_row _builder_version="4.24.2" custom_padding="0||40px||false|false"] [et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.24.2"] [et_pb_text _builder_version="4.24.2" module_class="ppl-section-label" text_text_align="center" custom_margin="0||8px||false|false"]Who This Platform Serves[/et_pb_text] [et_pb_text _builder_version="4.24.2" header_font="Playfair Display|700|||||||" header_text_color="#230d18" header_font_size="2.25rem" header_line_height="1.2em" header_letter_spacing="-0.025em" text_text_align="center" custom_margin="0||12px||false|false"]

Built for every stage of the legal journey.

[/et_pb_text] [et_pb_text _builder_version="4.24.2" text_font="DM Sans||||||||" text_text_color="#8a6a7a" text_font_size="16px" text_line_height="1.7em" text_text_align="center" max_width="520px" module_alignment="center"]Built for students who want direction without intimidation. There is already enough of that in law school.[/et_pb_text] [/et_pb_column] [/et_pb_row] [et_pb_row column_structure="1_3,1_3,1_3" _builder_version="4.24.2" use_custom_gutter="on" gutter_width="3"] [et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.24.2"] [et_pb_text _builder_version="4.24.2" module_class="ppl-stage-tag-rose" custom_margin="0||4px||false|false"]01 — Aspiring[/et_pb_text] [et_pb_blurb title="Pre-Law Students" use_icon="on" font_icon="" icon_color="#c43670" _builder_version="4.24.2" background_color="#ffffff" border_radii="on|16px|16px|16px|16px" custom_padding="32px|32px|32px|32px||true" module_class="ppl-blurb-card ppl-card-lift" icon_color_hover="#c43670"]You are preparing for law school and want to make well-informed decisions before day one.[/et_pb_blurb] [/et_pb_column] [et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.24.2"] [et_pb_text _builder_version="4.24.2" module_class="ppl-stage-tag-rose" custom_margin="0||4px||false|false"]02 — Current[/et_pb_text] [et_pb_blurb title="Law Students" use_icon="on" font_icon="" icon_color="#c43670" _builder_version="4.24.2" background_color="#ffffff" border_radii="on|16px|16px|16px|16px" custom_padding="32px|32px|32px|32px||true" module_class="ppl-blurb-card ppl-card-lift"]You are managing coursework, examinations, and professional opportunities. You want structure, not overwhelm.[/et_pb_blurb] [/et_pb_column] [et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.24.2"] [et_pb_text _builder_version="4.24.2" module_class="ppl-stage-tag-rose" custom_margin="0||4px||false|false"]03 — Graduates[/et_pb_text] [et_pb_blurb title="Recent Graduates & Bar Candidates" use_icon="on" font_icon="" icon_color="#c43670" _builder_version="4.24.2" background_color="#ffffff" border_radii="on|16px|16px|16px|16px" custom_padding="32px|32px|32px|32px||true" module_class="ppl-blurb-card ppl-card-lift"]You are transitioning into the profession and want to approach what comes next with confidence and clarity.[/et_pb_blurb] [/et_pb_column] [/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section] [et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.24.2" _builder_version="4.24.2" background_color="#230d18" custom_padding="96px||96px||false|false"][et_pb_row column_structure="5_12,7_12" _builder_version="4.24.2" use_custom_gutter="on" gutter_width="5"] [et_pb_column type="5_12" _builder_version="4.24.2"] [et_pb_image src="https://cdn.rit.edu/images/news/2024-04/WEB-20240210_shakira-smith_nycalumniupdate_0011_jamod.jpg" alt="Shakierah Smith" _builder_version="4.24.2" module_class="ppl-about-img" /] [/et_pb_column] [et_pb_column type="7_12" _builder_version="4.24.2"] [et_pb_text _builder_version="4.24.2" module_class="ppl-section-label-pink" custom_margin="0||12px||false|false"]About The Pinkprint[/et_pb_text] [et_pb_text _builder_version="4.24.2" header_font="Playfair Display|700|||||||" header_text_color="#ffffff" header_font_size="2.25rem" header_line_height="1.2em" custom_margin="0||16px||false|false"]

Too many law students are expected to simply "figure it out".

[/et_pb_text] [et_pb_text _builder_version="4.24.2" text_font="DM Sans||||||||" text_text_color="rgba(255,255,255,0.75)" text_font_size="16px" text_line_height="1.75em" custom_margin="0||16px||false|false"]I did not enter law school with a built-in roadmap or a family of attorneys. I came in as a first-generation student, learning the language, the expectations, and the unspoken rules of the profession in real time — often through trial and error. What I quickly recognized was that intelligence and work ethic were not the issue. Access to clear, honest guidance was.[/et_pb_text] [et_pb_text _builder_version="4.24.2" text_font="DM Sans||||||||" text_text_color="rgba(255,255,255,0.75)" text_font_size="16px" text_line_height="1.75em" custom_margin="0||40px||false|false"]My path was defined by preparation, discipline, and a deep commitment to excellence. I graduated in the top five percent of my class at the University at Buffalo School of Law. Out of this came The Pinkprint Lawyer — a guide for law students left to just "figure it out".[/et_pb_text] [et_pb_button button_text="Read the Full Story" button_url="#" button_alignment="left" _builder_version="4.24.2" custom_button="on" button_text_color="#ff89c5" button_bg_color="rgba(0,0,0,0)" button_border_width="2px" button_border_color="rgba(255,137,197,0.4)" button_border_radius="12px" button_font="DM Sans|600|||||||" module_class="ppl-btn-outline-light" /] [/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section] [et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.24.2" background_color="#ffffff" custom_padding="96px||96px||false|false"] [et_pb_row _builder_version="4.24.2" custom_padding="0||32px||false|false"] [et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.24.2"] [et_pb_text _builder_version="4.24.2" module_class="ppl-section-label" custom_margin="0||8px||false|false"]Featured Digital Products[/et_pb_text] [et_pb_text _builder_version="4.24.2" header_font="Playfair Display|700|||||||" header_text_color="#230d18" header_font_size="2rem" header_line_height="1.2em" header_letter_spacing="-0.025em" custom_margin="0||12px||false|false"]

Each pinkprint addresses a specific stage of your journey.

[/et_pb_text] [et_pb_text _builder_version="4.24.2" text_font="DM Sans||||||||" text_text_color="#8a6a7a" text_font_size="16px" text_line_height="1.7em"]Each pinkprint is designed with clear takeaways and realistic strategies you can apply immediately. Choose what fits your current season.[/et_pb_text] [/et_pb_column] [/et_pb_row] [et_pb_row column_structure="1_4,1_4,1_4,1_4" _builder_version="4.24.2" use_custom_gutter="on" gutter_width="3"] custom_margin="0||8px||false|false"]How It Works[/et_pb_text] [et_pb_text _builder_version="4.24.2" header_font="Playfair Display|700|||||||" header_text_color="#230d18" header_font_size="2.25rem" header_line_height="1.2em" text_text_align="center" custom_margin="0||12px||false|false"]

Three steps to moving forward with clarity.

[/et_pb_text] [et_pb_text _builder_version="4.24.2" text_font="DM Sans||||||||" text_text_color="#8a6a7a" text_font_size="16px" text_line_height="1.7em" text_text_align="center" max_width="480px" module_alignment="center"]One intentional step at a time.[/et_pb_text] [/et_pb_column] [/et_pb_row] [et_pb_row column_structure="1_3,1_3,1_3" _builder_version="4.24.2" use_custom_gutter="on" gutter_width="3"] [et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.24.2"] [et_pb_blurb title="Find Your Stage" use_icon="on" font_icon="" icon_color="#c43670" _builder_version="4.24.2" background_color="#ffffff" border_radii="on|16px|16px|16px|16px" custom_padding="32px|32px|32px|32px||true" module_class="ppl-blurb-card"]Identify where you are in your legal journey — pre-law, enrolled, or post-graduate. This determines everything that follows.[/et_pb_blurb] [/et_pb_column] [et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.24.2"] [et_pb_blurb title="Choose Your Pinkprint" use_icon="on" font_icon="" icon_color="#c43670" _builder_version="4.24.2" background_color="#ffffff" border_radii="on|16px|16px|16px|16px" custom_padding="32px|32px|32px|32px||true" module_class="ppl-blurb-card"]Select the resource that fits your current season. Each pinkprint is purpose-built with clear takeaways you can apply immediately.[/et_pb_blurb] [/et_pb_column] [et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.24.2"] [et_pb_blurb title="Move with Clarity" use_icon="on" font_icon="" icon_color="#c43670" _builder_version="4.24.2" background_color="#ffffff" border_radii="on|16px|16px|16px|16px" custom_padding="32px|32px|32px|32px||true" module_class="ppl-blurb-card"]Apply the strategies, follow the frameworks, and advance through your legal education with intention — not guesswork.[/et_pb_blurb] [/et_pb_column] [/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section] [et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.24.2" background_color="#faf4f7" custom_padding="96px||96px||false|false"] [et_pb_row _builder_version="4.24.2" custom_padding="0||40px||false|false"] [et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.24.2"] [et_pb_text _builder_version="4.24.2" module_class="ppl-section-label" text_text_align="center" custom_margin="0||8px||false|false"]Student Stories[/et_pb_text] [et_pb_text _builder_version="4.24.2" header_font="Playfair Display|700|||||||" header_text_color="#230d18" header_font_size="2.25rem" text_text_align="center"]

Real students. Real results.
